snippet.title: Chhor Denge: Parampara Tandon | Sachet-Parampara | Nora Fatehi, Ehan Bhat | Arvindr K, Bhushan Kumar
snippet.description:
Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Chhor Denge", a brand new song in the voice of “Parampara Tandon" featuring Nora Fatehi & Ehan Bhat. The lyrics of new song are penned by Yogesh Dubey &  music composed by Sachet-Parampara. The video is directed by Arvindr Khaira.

snippet.title: Uppena Telugu Movie Trailer | Panja Vaisshnav Tej | Krithi Shetty | Vijay Sethupathi | Buchi Babu
snippet.description:
Uppena Telugu Movie Trailer on Mythri Movie Makers. #Uppena Latest 2021 Telugu Movie ft. Panja Vaisshnav Tej, Vijay Sethupathi and Krithi Shetty. Written & Directed by Buchi Babu Sana. Music by DSP / Devi Sri Prasad. Presented by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers & Sukumar Writings banners.

Uppena Trailer is officially released by Young Tiger NTR.

The tale of an incredible love, Uppena movie is all set for a Grand Release in theaters on February 12th, 2021.

#PanjaVaisshnavTej #VijaySethupathi #KrithiShetty #UppenaTrailer #BuchiBabuSana #DSP #DeviSriPrasad #MythriMovieMakers

snippet.title: Ghost Scenario - The Reality | Jump Cuts | Hari & Naresh
snippet.description:
Make meaningful connections without stepping out of your house. Download happn now :
http://gethap.pn/Iw5k
--
For Business Enquiries : jumpcuts16@gmail.com
___________________________________

Have you had a savage ghost video or ghost in the house? Jump Cuts presents a video of “Ghost Scenario.” 

That creepy 2 am call from Ramesh has raised too many questions in his friend’s mind. He goes to the terrace to meet Ramesh, but alas! There’s no one. 

Suddenly, he sees Ramesh standing there. His body shivered with fear. Ramesh kept his hand on his friend’s shoulder and was about to tell a secret. Just when he opened his mouth, the phone rang. It’s Ramesh’s mother’s call. He learns from Ramesh’s mother that Ramesh is dead.

Why did Ramesh call his friend to the terrace? What secret does he want to say? 

If Ramesh is dead, who was calling? Find out in “Ghost Scenario” - a scary short video. Stay tuned to Jump Cuts for the full video.

snippet.title: Smartness doesn't come through books. How to learn Emotional Intelligence: Dr. Vikas Divyakirti.
snippet.description:
प्रिय व्यूअर्स, 

Interesting Moments की इस सीरीज़ में हम डॉ. विकास दिव्यकीर्ति सर की हिंदी साहित्य, एथिक्स और निबंध की क्लासेज की छोटी -छोटी वीडियो क्लिप्स साझा कर रहे हैं। इन वीडियोज़ से आप यह सीख पाएंगे कि कैसे कठिन से कठिन बातों को भी आसानी से सीखा जा सकता है। सर के पढ़ाने का रोचक तरीका सहज ही विषय के प्रति रुचि जगा देता है। जब आप इनसे गुजरेंगे तो इस बात को महसूस कर सकेंगे। इसमें मोटिवेशन, हास्य विनोद तथा जीवन से जुड़ी कुछ महत्त्वपूर्ण बातें होती हैं।

यह वीडियो क्लिप डॉ. विकास दिव्यकीर्ति सर की एथिक्स क्लास की है। इस वीडियो के माध्यम से आप यह समझ पाएंगे कि सीखने के अलग-अलग तरीकों में कौन-सा बेहतर है? आमतौर पर हम किताबों से ही जीवन की हर सीख प्राप्त कर लेना चाहते हैं, लेकिन व्यावहारिक रूप से ऐसा संभव नहीं होता। एक सीमा के बाद सीखने की यह पद्धति काम नहीं आती। इस वीडियो में सर इसी विषय पर चर्चा कर रहे हैं कि बेहतर व्यक्तित्व के लिये सीखने की प्रक्रिया को किस प्रकार साधा जाना चाहिये। प्रसिद्ध मनोवैज्ञानिक डेनियल गोलमेन के सिद्धांत को सर रोचक उदाहरण के माध्यम से बता रहे हैं।

#ShortVideos #VikasSir #InterestingMoments

=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵=̵

👉 To know the 𝐝𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬 𝐨𝐫 𝐭𝐨 𝐫𝐞𝐠𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫 through our website click on this link: https://bit.ly/2JF1cJx

𝐏𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐂𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐞𝐬 (𝐇𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐢 𝐋𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐈𝐀𝐒 𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐦𝐬):

यह वीडियो क्लिप डॉ. विकास दिव्यकीर्ति सर की एथिक्स क्लास की है। इस वीडियो के माध्यम से आप यह समझ पाएंगे कि सीखने के अलग-अलग तरीकों में कौन-सा बेहतर है? आमतौर पर हम किताबों से ही जीवन की हर सीख प्राप्त कर लेना चाहते हैं, लेकिन व्यावहारिक रूप से ऐसा संभव नहीं होता। एक सीमा के बाद सीखने की यह पद्धति काम नहीं आती। इस वीडियो में सर इसी विषय पर चर्चा कर रहे हैं कि बेहतर व्यक्तित्व के लिये सीखने की प्रक्रिया को किस प्रकार साधा जाना चाहिये। प्रसिद्ध मनोवैज्ञानिक डेनियल गोलमेन के सिद्धांत को सर रोचक उदाहरण के माध्यम से बता रहे हैं।

#ShortVideos #VikasSir #InterestingMoments

snippet.title: RiRi (Rihanna) Song By Diljit Dosanjh | Intense | Raj Ranjodh
snippet.description:
Presenting RiRi (Rihanna) full audio song performed by DILJIT DOSANJH 
SUBSCRIBE to channel ► https://bit.ly/diljitdosanjhchannel
 #DiljitDosanjh

Song: RiRi
Singer: Diljit Dosanjh
Lyricist - Raj Ranjodh 
Music - Intense

Lyrics Translation:-

Oh Beautiful One of Barbados, 
Your skin tone golden as though born of wheat.
Raj (lyricist) salutes the Almighty, 
Who set this Angelic Beauty on Earth.

I'll gift you a special Patiala Style Outfit,
I'll buy you Anklets, I'm Crazy for you.
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna

You have big wide eyes, 
you are a true treasure of Beauty
I'll be at your Concert, wearing a Kurta Pajama
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna

Oh the things your eyes do to us,
You have Punjabi Fans crazy for you, Ms. Fenty Beauty
The Breadth of your Fan Base makes the haters burn with jealousy
In the middle of the night, tossed them haters into trolley

The world is in a Trance behind your sway
Oh Rihanna, Oh Rihanna
Try on this Punjabi Outfit i had sewn for you from Moga, Oh Rihanna
I'll be at your concert wearing Kurta Pajama
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna

snippet.description:
With just two minutes to play, Barça looked to be heading out of the cup when the blaugrana pressure finally paid off, the away side scoring two late goals to take the game into extra time. In the additional 30 minutes, Ronald Koeman's side secured their place in the semi-finals with goals from Griezmann, De Jong and Jordi Alba to seal victory! Check out the highlights!

snippet.title: CLAY POT MUTTON CURRY | Traditional Mutton Recipe Cooking in Village | Mud Pot Mutton Recipes
snippet.description:
Every day, our ancestors used clay pot vessels to cook their food. Today we use a clay pot to cook our favorite mutton curry recipe. 

Clay pot gives the extraordinary smell and aroma of the food. Foods that are cook in clay pots, It's very healthy and tasty as well. We use traditional masalas, Cold-pressed gingelly oil to make the mutton recipe healthy and traditional.

Finally, we enjoy the food, the taste is delicious!!

snippet.title: మా గృహప్రవేశం 🏠 Package from INDIA to USA 🌺🌸|| బొమ్మల పెళ్లి👫,గ్రుహ కళ్యాణం,వాస్తు,వ్రతం సామగ్రి 🧺🔔
snippet.description:
My Instagram link: 
https://www.instagram.com/kalyaniboppa

House of Kalyani Boppa: 
https://www.instagram.com/houseof_kalyaniboppa/

The Knot Co Hand Madee - Dresses, Clutch, and Saree
https://instagram.com/theknotcohandmadee?igshid=12tp25mervyey

For our Gruha Pravesham, I planned and want to do many as many pujas and rituals as i can like our Parents did to our houses in INDIA. 

We are doing,
1. Gruha pravesham
2. Kooradu Neeradu
3. Gumpidi Gunja
4. Vasthu Puja
5. Vasthu Homam
6. Gruha Kalyanam
7. Satya Narayana Vratham

I would need many things that i couldn't find here in USA. So i planned this package from India. 
Some of these items i bought in Amazon, Remaining all my parents bought.
My mom worked so hard to get all this listed items. Package came in time. 

I'm showing them here, So you people will get to know things we would need for gruha pravesham, Pujas and rituals i planned, Also some tricks and tips of packing and planning.

Hope you like it!! 

Renovation series videos are below:
https://youtu.be/I1iggnkS29o
https://youtu.be/QcacY60mR0Q
https://youtu.be/J8Q8vq_cPPI
https://youtu.be/0K5j1yIj2Hg
https://youtu.be/1tiEeOP1FVw
https://youtu.be/paz43G-qugM


If you like this video give it a 👍👍 👍

For our Gruha Pravesham, I planned and want to do many as many pujas and rituals as i can like our Parents did to our houses in INDIA. 

We are doing,
1. Gruha pravesham
2. Kooradu Neeradu
3. Gumpidi Gunja
4. Vasthu Puja
5. Vasthu Homam
6. Gruha Kalyanam
7. Satya Narayana Vratham

I would need many things that i couldn't find here in USA. So i planned this package from India. 
Some of these items i bought in Amazon, Remaining all my parents bought.
My mom worked so hard to get all this listed items. Package came in time. 

I'm showing them here, So you people will get to know things we would need for gruha pravesham, Pujas and rituals i planned, Also some tricks and tips of packing and planning.

Hope you like it!!

snippet.title: The Girl On The Train | Official Trailer | Parineeti Chopra, Aditi Rao Hydari & Kirti Kulhari
snippet.description:
The journey has begun and there's no turning back. Are you in?

A bright city, a dull morning and a curious girl on the train. When a voyeuristic divorcee fixates on the lives of a perfect couple from afar, she soon gets embroiled in a murder mystery that unfolds revealing truths about her own life. Get on board a thrilling experience with Parineeti Chopra, Aditi Rao Hydari, Kirti Kulhari and Avinash Tiwary. Catch Ribhu Dasgupta's The Girl On The Train on 26th February, only on Netflix.

Official Teaser: https://youtu.be/3iH0YehfMB0

snippet.title: We are a 'Dry State' | Comedy | Dreamz Unlimited
snippet.description:
Nagaland Liquor Total Prohibition (NLTP) Act, 1989 was passed on Nagaland Legislative Assembly in 1989. Those who support alcohol prohibition point at the dangers of drinking, the lives it has destroyed and the misery caused. They no doubt have a point, but some countered that alcohol consumption should be regulated in public interest, and not totally prohibited.
Nevertheless, Nagaland became a ‘dry state’ and instead of drinking legally, people started drinking ‘illegally.’
The inflow of liquor into the dry state has since remained regular and adequate for the consumers over the last 31 years and hundreds of people are arrested every year for “contravention of the provision” of the Act.
This video is a satire take on the subject.

Concept & Production
Dreamz Unlimited Team

Follow us on Instagram 

https://www.instagram.com/dreamzunlim​...

Facebook

https://www.facebook.com/DreamzUnlimi​...

Email - dreamznaga@gmail.com

snippet.title: Ninnila Ninnila | Ashok Selvan | Ritu Varma | Nithya Menen | Zee Studios | 26th Feb
snippet.description:
What happens when Dev, a hefty genius chef with muscle spasms, Tara, his co-worker with OCD and Maya, a happy-go-lucky girl with the mind of a child, cross paths?

Find out in the super entertainer #NinnilaNinnila​​, brewing in a kitchen with a pinch of romance and a handful of comedy!

snippet.title: How a dog survived night in a toilet with leopard in Karnataka
snippet.description: Now, dog Bollu has a formidable reputation among the mongrels of Bilinele village in Dakshina Kannada, having survived a night and day with a leopard in a toilet, at the end of which he walked out while the leopard darted through the roof. And the dog survived the horror. Jayalakshmi, the owner of the house, was at her relative’s on Tuesday night, when the leopard likely strayed in from the adjacent Kombaru reserve forest. Early Wednesday morning, a family member saw the stout tail of the leopard through the toilet door. Without skipping a beat, she locked the door and went on to call forest officials. What bystanders captured through the toilet window was intriguing: the leopard curled into a corner, and diagonally opposite was Bollu, each apparently having marked their territory in captivity. The house belongs to late Venkappa Gowda of Moolemane in Kaikamba. “It is located adjacent to Kombaru forest. The leopard may have entered human habitation chasing the dog at night. And while the dog took shelter in the toilet, the leopard probably followed it,” said Subrahmanya Range RFO HT Raghavendra. The two remained closeted, in a space barely 3 feet by four feet, until 1.45pm on Wednesday when the big cat made a dash for it. Through the morning, forest officials placed two layers of nets on the asbestos sheets that served as the toilet roof and got permission to dart the animal.

LYRICS:

Soch, Kitna Maza Ayega,
Jab Hum Tum, Pahaado Ke Shehar Mein Rahenge
Aur Tere Mere Din Bhi Kuch Ghanto Mei Guzrenge
Soch, Kitna Maza Ayega,
Jab Hum Tum Bs Ek He Sadak Pe Chalenge
Hathoon Mein Hath Liye, Bas Baatein Karenge 

Baatein, Kuch Anjaani Si, Kuch Nakli Si, Kuch Diwaani Si, 
Oooo Humpe Ye Samaa Bhi Muskurayega….
Soch, Kitna Mazza Ayega….
Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha, Ha, Ha Ha 
Mazaa Ayega….
Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha, Ha, Ha Ha

Trumpet Music……

Ek Aam Ka Paudha, Jo Bachpan Mein Boya Tha 
Ek Raja Ka Beta, Jo Jungle Mein Khoya Tha…
Ek Aam Ka Paudha, Jo Bachpan Mein Boya Tha
Ek Raja Ka Beta, Jo Jungle Mein Khoya Tha

Oo Teri Ye Sab Baatein, Mujhe Achi Lagti Hai
O Jab Tu Choti Si, Aur Pyari Si,Paanch Saal Ki, Ek Bachhi Lagti Hai 
Ho... Koi Puraan Quissa Tere Chehre Pe, Hansi Layega…
Soch Kitna Maza Ayega….. Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha, Ha, Ha Ha
Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha, Ha, Ha Ha 
Maza Ayega…

Trumpet Music

snippet.title: GPS - Official Short Film | PRK Short | Gopalkrishna Deshpande | Raghunandan Kaanadka
snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Short Film 'GPS' Directed by Raghunandan Kaanadka.

A cab driver has lost his way after dropping a passenger in a remote outskirts of Bangalore, trying to find his way back using his mobile GPS, but his mobile too dies out of charge and an unintentionally invited guest accompanies him and tries to assist his way back to his life.The Drama unfolds between them as they encounter the journey together, will they find peace with each other, or within themselves?

CAST : Gopalkrishna Deshpande | Manjunath Hegade | Anand Tumkur | Kiran Nayak | Divya Bajpai | Pragathi Prabhu | Prabhudev Hosdurga | Baby ankitha
Production House: FLAUNGE | TEEPOI FILMS
Direction :Raghunandan Kaanadka
Script: Flaunge writers’ Block in association with satyan Balaga
Original Short Story : Raghunandan Kaanadka
Dialogues: Sampath Sirimane 
Associate Director : Punith Kabbur
Co-wiriters: Chetan K C |Karthik R |Padmaprasad Jain |Swaroop P Diwakar|
Director of photography : Vishwesh Shiva Prasad
Associate Cinematographer : Vinayak
Executive Producer: Kiran Midigeshi
Music Direction: Navaneeth Sham
Editor: Raghunandan Kaanadka
VFX: Redin Kumar | Novefel Nagore
Assistant Directors: Shamanth Chandra |Arjun A R |Mahantesh Doddamani|Phani Raj
Publicity Designs: Kaani studio
Art Director: Sridhar Murthy
Sound designer: Aravind Menon
SFX: Shibin naduveettil

PRK Digital & Social Media: Satish V and Badarinath Venkatesh
PRK Team: Gururaj R Gangemane and Girija Nagendra

snippet.title: Kannana Kanne - Ep 71 | 04 Feb 2021 | Sun TV Serial | Tamil Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the latest Episode of popular Tamil Serial #KannanaKanne that airs on Sun TV.

You can now watch your favourite serials Free on Sun NXT. Offer Valid till 25th Feb 2021
 
Kannana Kanne is a family drama serial on Sun TV. Goutham, a rich businessman despises his daughter Meera as he holds her responsible for the loss of his beloved wife and immense wealth on the day she was born. Though Meera shares a special bond with her stepmother and stepsister, she grows up yearning for her father’s love and affection. Will destiny pave the way for Meera to win over her father’s heart.

snippet.title: SI Sireesha : ‘‘పోషించే శక్తి లేక 13 ఏళ్లకే పెళ్లి చేసేశారు. చాలా కష్టాలు పడి ఈ స్థాయికి వచ్చా’’
snippet.description:
‘‘అమ్మనాన్నలకు పెట్టే స్తోమత లేదు, అత్తమామలకు పెట్టే మనసు లేదు.  చేసే పనిలో దేవుడిని చూస్తా, అందుకే దానిని శవంలా చూడలేదు. శివుడిలానే చూశా. ఎన్నో కష్టాలు పడి చదువుకున్నాను, ఇప్పటికీ చదువుతున్నా, గ్రూప్ వన్ సాధించాలన్నదే నా ఆశయం అంటున్న కాశీబుగ్గ ఎస్సై శిరీషతో బీబీసీ ప్రత్యేక ఇంటర్వ్యూ 
#SISireesha #Srikakulam #Kasibugga #AndhraPradesh 
-- 
కరోనావైరస్‌ మన శరీరాన్ని ఎలా దెబ్బతీస్తుంది? వైరస్ సోకితే చనిపోయే ఆస్కారం ఎంత? వ్యాక్సీన్ ఎప్పుడు వస్తుంది? ఈ మహమ్మారికి అంతం ఎప్పుడు? – ఇలాంటి అనేక ప్రశ్నలకు సమాధానాల కోసం ఈ ప్లేలిస్టు https://bit.ly/3aiDb2A చూడండి.  

కరోనావైరస్‌ ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్, తెలంగాణ రాష్ట్రాల్లో, భారతదేశంలో ఎలా వ్యాపిస్తోంది? అమెరికా, బ్రెజిల్, బ్రిటన్, ఇతర దేశాల్లో దీని ప్రభావం ఎంత తీవ్రంగా ఉంది? – ఇలాంటి అనేక అంశాలపై బీబీసీ తెలుగు వెబ్‌సైట్ కథనాల కోసం ఈ లింక్  https://bbc.in/34GUoSa క్లిక్ చేయండి. 

ఫేస్‌బుక్, ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్, ట్విటర్‌లలో బీబీసీ తెలుగును ఫాలో అవ్వండి. 

ఫేస్‌బుక్: https://www.facebook.com/BBCnewsTelugu 

ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్: https://www.instagram.com/bbcnewstelugu/ 

ట్విటర్: https://www.instagram.com/bbcnewstelugu/

snippet.title: Angana Morey | Shreya Ghoshal & Soumyadeep Ghoshal
snippet.description:
Shreya Ghoshal teams up with her talented brother, Soumyadeep Ghoshal to compose and produce this intense yet intricate electronic pop ode to the feeling of longing, titled “Angana Morey”. 
Sung by the inimitable Shreya Ghoshal, Angana Morey, is rooted, earthy and intense. Shreya makes her presence felt through her idiomatic phrasing, penning words that invoke the bittersweet feeling of longing and reunion. Shreya’s lyrics and singing, transport you into a satisfying trance, while Soumyadeep switches to top gear with his intelligent production, fusing electronic layers with the magnanimous Budapest Symphony Orchestra, guitars, tabla and distinguished flute parts that all converge into a dramatic confluence!
The song is Shreya’s contemporary interpretation of the girl longing for her beloved, deeply in love for each other, but away from her. The raag, the composition and the music are encapsulating and transport you like a whirlwind from one universe to another, visually captured by the choreography and life like projections in the video.

Singer, Composer, Lyricist : Shreya Ghoshal
Music Produced by : Soumyadeep Ghoshal
Additional Production, Live Strings Orchestrated by : Samarth Srinivasan
Tabla : Nitin Mitta
Flute : Rajeev Prasanna
Guitars : Soumyadeep Ghoshal
Live Strings : Budapest Art Orchestra
Mixed and Mastered by Aftab Khan at Headroom Studio, Mumbai 
Mix Assistant Vatsal Chevli

Directed by Nazeef Mohammed
Edited by Allan Fernandes 
DOP : Ronnel Parmar
Conceptualisation by Nazeef Mohammed and Allan Fernandes
Motion Graphics Director : Mayur Sharma
3D Artist : Parth Reshamwala
Face Mapping : Prashant Bhikadia
Illustrator : Robin Chakraborty
Graded by Mayur Sharma and Nitesse
Offline Edit by Sagar Parikh
Assistant Editor : Yogesh Chandravanshi
Additional Artwork : Gayathri Sankaran

Choreography : Shakti Mohan 
Assistant Choreography : Somya Kautia, NrityaShakti
Dancers : Mukta Nagpal and Parth Sethi , NrityaShakti 

Production Team : Parth Shah, Renish Kotodia, Rohan Shetty, Deep Dave and Meher Singh
Project Coordinators : Smrithi Menon and Khushboo Gugle
Video Conceptualised , Produced and Post Produced at BToS Productions

Distributed by : Believe Digital

Lyrics :-
Aao sajan angana morey
Aao sajan angana morey 
Din rain tumari yaad sataye
Aao sajan angana morey 
Aao sajan angana morey
Aao sajan... Angana Morey.. Angana Morey..

(Music)

Raag preet ka tumne sunaya 
Saat suron mein mohe sajaya 

Tere moh mein aise
Man bheetar mehak rahi hun

Is peedh ko samjho piya 
Haan is peedh ko samjho piya
Jiya ab na maane 

Aao sajan angana morey
Aao sajan angana morey 
Din rain tumari yaad sataye
Aao sajan

(Music)

Aao.. Sajan aao.. aaa..
Sajan laagi.. 
Laagi mohe jog piya.. 
Sajan... 
Aao sajan angana morey..
Aao sajan..

YouTube Music https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=WoznBG-Qfw4&feature=share

'Haldia এ Modi এর মঞ্চে Dev, Sisir', Soumitra এর Tweet ঘিরে শোরগোল, 'আমন্ত্রণের জন্য ধন্যবাদ': Dev

'হলদিয়ায় মোদী এর মঞ্চে দেব, শিশির অধিকারী', সৌমিত্র খাঁ এর টুইট ঘিরে শোরগোল, 'আমন্ত্রণের জন্য ধন্যবাদ': দেব

#NarendraModi #SoumitraKhan #Dev

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1168 & 1169 | Recap
snippet.description:
After getting into an accident, Virat's mother arrives at the house for help and a group of Soumya's community arrive to bless Kuhu on the celebration of Kuhu's 'Annaprashan' ceremony in the same house. Will Heer end up crossing paths with them and face her past yet again?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KvW8epq68trmgmuFgW1dWBY

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Missamma || Episode 1 || Vaishnavi Chaitanya || Arjun Kalyan || Infinitum Media
snippet.description:
From the creators of #softwaredevloveper comes a story of innocence, gumption and redemption. Follow and enjoy the journey of "Mahalakshmi" as she traverses through life's emotions with grit and panache. 


"Missamma" is a Telugu  Web Series Featuring Vaishnavi Chaitanya, Arjun Kalyan & Avinash Reddy Anam

Cast:- Vaishnavi chaitanya, Arjun Kalyan , Avinash Reddy Anam,  Kavya & Mounica .

Directed by Venkat Rdy ( Naani )

Written - Prashanth Babu Ragathi

Editing & D.I :- Raj Krish

Cinematography  - Bhanu Prakash Musmuri

Sound engineer - Vamshi Vinod Nalli ( Nani )

Title and publicity designer - Nikhil Concepts

Poster Design :-  Design Manchu

Title Animation :- Konte Pavan kumar 

Executive producer - Sri Vidya P

Music - Srujan Shashanka

Producer : Infinitum Media

#VaishnaviChaitanya is known for her music videos and cover songs and for acting in the Blockbuster Movie "Ala Vaikunta Puram Lo".

" Vaishnavi Chaitanya is a Telugu comedy & Entertainment Youtube Content Creator &  Actor at Telugu Film Industry.

This is produced by Infinitum media.

#Missamma

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

Purvi, a Molkki Dulhan finds herself in an arranged marriage to Virender, a widowed man twice her age and still in love with his dead wife. Soon, she discovers that she has been “sold” by her father and is merely a clause for the inheritance of his uncle’s land. Will she stand up and fight for her dignity? Will her marital deal blossom into a loving relationship?

snippet.title: Vallamai Tharayo | EP 75 | YouTube Exclusive | Digital Daily Series | 05-02-2021
snippet.description:
Co-presented by ITC Aashirvaad Superior MP Atta Vallamai Tharayo -https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list...
Buy Aashirvaad atta now like Abhirami to make easy to make recipes from Aashirvaad Atta’s Cookbook: http://bit.ly/aashirvaadcookbook
விகடன் டெலிவிஸ்டாஸ் மற்றும் மோஷன் கன்டென்ட் குரூப் நிறுவனங்கள் இணைந்து தயாரிக்கும் இந்தியாவின் முதல் யூடியூப் டெய்லி சீரிஸ் `வல்லமை தாராயோ’. திங்கள் முதல் வெள்ளிவரை இரவு 7.00 மணிக்கு யூடியூபில் (https://goo.gl/QiBz7h) மட்டும் ஒளிபரப்பாகத் தொடங்கியிருக்கும் இந்த சீரிஸ் ஒரு பெண்ணின் வாழ்க்கையையும், அவளின் உணர்வுகளையும் மையப் படுத்தியது. Presenting the latest episode of #VallamaiTharayo - India's 1st #DailyDigitalSeries on #YouTube from the house of Vikatan Televistas & Motion Content Group. #VikatanDigitalDaily #YouTubePremiumDaily 

Story & Screenplay by 'Kolangal' V. Thiruselvam, directed by Chidambaram Manivannan, starring Shali Nivekas, VJ Parvathy, Vivek Rajagopal, Kaushick, Saranya Ravichandran and R S Shivaji with a host of others, this series runs Monday to Friday, 7 PM only on YouTube. Subscribe to our channel to stay tuned.

Director  Chidambaram Manivannan
Story & Screenplay  ‘Kolangal’ V. Thiruselvam
Additional Screenplay Veki Amirtharaj
Cinematographer Sathya Venkataraman
Music Director K.C. Balasarangan
Editor Chandru.B
Art Director Vasu Dhevan
Sound Design K Dileep
Dialogues Paari Ayyasami
Additional Dialogues Rajkamal Bharathi
Lyricist Aravind Kumar
Colourist Karthick Chandrasekar
Designer Pradeep Raj
Subtitles  Dhi Subtitles

Vikatan and Motion Content Group, in association with YouTube, present a Digital Daily, exclusively on YouTube. Please show some love to 'Vallamai Tharayo' (trans. Give me the strength). Vikatan's first 'Digital Only' outing, a daily that shall not be on TV but only on YouTube.  This offering from Vikatan that shall join #VikatanPrimeTime in the company of Alaigal, Kolangal, Thirumathi Selvam, Thendral, Azhagi and the currently running show on SUN TV - Naayagi.
Around 22 years back, in the first week of November 1998, Vikatan Televistas started their journey with a weekly serial Akshaya on SUN TV, every Thursday at 9 pm. It has been more than 2 decades of entertaining you - our audience. We thank you for your support, love and criticism all these years. #20YearsOfVikatanTelevistas#FromTheHouseOfVikatanAndMotionContentGroup #Vikatan #DigitalDailySeries

snippet.title: Marakkar Update | Kunju Kunjali | K S  Chitra | Marakkar Arabikadalinte Simham
snippet.description:
Marakkar Lion of the Arabian Sea, Written and Directed By Priyadarshan and Produced By Antony Perumbavoor Under the Banner Aashirvad Cinemas.

Starring Mohanlal, Pranav Mohanlal, Arjun, Suniel Shetty, Prabhu, Manju Warrier, Suhasini,  Keerthi Suresh, Kalyani Priyadarshan, Fazil, Siddique, Nedumudi Venu, Innocent, Ashok Selvan and Others.

Singer : KS Chitra
Music Director : Ronnie Raphael
Lyricist :  Hari Narayanan

Co Producers: Dr. Roy C J, Santhosh T Kuruvilla
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Cinematography : Thiru
Screenplay: Priyadarshan, Ani I.V. SASI
Film Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Background Score: Ankit Suri, Rahul Raj, Lyell Evans Roeder (London)
Production Controller: Sidhu Panakkal
Action: Thyagarajan, Kazu Neda (Thailand)
Makeup: Pattanam Rasheed

All Languages Music Rights By Saina Audio and Video

Kunju Kunjali Lyrical Song From Marakkar: Arabikadalinte Simham Releasing on 5th Feb 2021

🔴 Is the app available on ios?
As of now, App is available on only Google Playstore. Our team is working on it too.

🔴 I forgot my password, Now?
When you try to login, you’ll find a link below forget password. You’ll receive an OTP on your registered number, then you can change your password.

🔴 What if i skip the live class, Can i watch later?
Yes, Video will be saved in your course playlist. Even if you are not available at that time, You can watch it later at any time umpteen times & these videos will be there for 1 Month after course completion.

snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Kanyadaan" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

snippet.title: નરેન્દ્ર મોદીના ભાઈ પ્રહ્લાદ મોદીએ અમિત શાહના પુત્ર વિશે શું કહ્યું? BBC Exclusive
snippet.description:
#gujarat #localbodyelection #narendramodi #prahladmodi 

ગુજરાતમાં સ્થાનિક સ્વરાજની ચૂંટણીને લઈને તમામ પક્ષોએ તૈયારી શરૂ કરી દીધી છે. 

નરેન્દ્ર મોદીના ભાઈ પ્રહ્લાદ મોદીના પુત્રી સોનલ મોદી આ ચૂંટણીમાં ઉમેદવારી નોંધાવી રહ્યા છે. 

બીબીસી સંવાદદાતા તેજસ વૈદ્યએ પ્રહ્લાદભાઈ સાથે વાત કરી. 

વીડિયો : ઉત્સવ ગજ્જર 

તમે અમારી સાથે જોડાઈ શકો છો : 

Website : https://www.bbc.com/gujarati 
Facebook : https://bit.ly/2nRrazj 
Instagram : https://bit.ly/2oE5W7S 
Twitter : https://bit.ly/2oLSi2r

Helo : BBC News ગુજરાતી

snippet.description:

Swiggy orders : https://bit.ly/39RYP0N
Location : http://bit.ly/36KkOoe
Nandhana palace
Siruseri, Sipcot. OMR

Nandhana, the pillar of expertise stands as an identity for hospitality and a symbol of bountifulness. Focusing on delivering “Tasty yet healthy Food”, we use the finest of the ingredients to serve the richest of the taste and spread most of the joy. Our Best Restaurant in Bangalore has brought in a consolidated and delectable Andhra cuisine along with creating an eating experience that is cherished for long 30 years and counting. Nandhana Restaurants is the first name that comes to the mind of visitors when they visit Bangalore city and locals alike when it comes to Authentic Andhra Food.

“Nandhana Restaurants” is a group of Fine Dining Andhra Restaurants with 15 branches in the top localities all across Bangalore. Striving to multiply the ethnicity of food, culture, environment, and taste, Nandhana spreads its wings into providing extravagant banquets, delicious sweets, comfortable accommodations and much more. Here at Nandhana, we have attempted to connect all the dots of hospitality. No wonder it is known for its best Andhra cuisine in Bangalore.

snippet.title: ही एक ग्रेवी बनवुन ठेवा आणि हवं तेव्हा हॉटेलसारखी कोणतीही डिश फक्त 10 मिनिटात बनवा/All purpose gravy
snippet.description:
In this video I will share recipe of restaurant style all purpose gravy, using this gravy you can make many dishes within 10-15 mins and tastes awesome.

या विडियो मध्ये आपण पाहणार आहोत हॉटेल मध्ये वापरली जाणारी ग्रेवी जी वापरून बर्‍याच प्रकारच्या डिश आपण 10-15 मिनिटात बनवू शकतो.. 

Ingredients / साहित्य ( 4 restaurant style dishes / 4 डिश साठी) 

Tomato / टोमॅटो 500gms 
Onion / कांदे 500gms 
Ginger / आले 50gms
Garlic / लसुण 50gms
Pumpkin seeds / मगज बी 50gms
Cadhew / काजू 25-30
Oil / तेल 6-7 tbsp
Bay leaf / तमालपत्र 4-5
Cinnamon / दालचिनी 2 inch
Black cardamom / मसाला वेलची 1
Green cardamom / हिरव्या वेलची 6-7
Cloves / लवंगा 7-8
Cumin seeds / जीरे 1 tbsp
Salt / मीठ 
Corriender powder / धणे पूड 2 tsp
Sugar / साखर 2 tsp
Red chilly powder / लाल मिरची पावडर 1&1/2 tsp
Turmeric / हळद 1 tsp

#allpurposegravy
#hotelsarkhigravy
#ग्रेवीएकसब्जियांअनेक
#ग्रेवीएकभाज्याअनेक 
#gravyeksabjiyaanek
#allpurposegravy
#testaurantstylegravy
#saritaskitchen

snippet.title: Babita Aur Iyer Ko Jetha Se Urgent Kaam!  |  Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता - Ep 3095
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi

Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi

Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.
